title: pimpinella zagrosica
intro: Pimpinella zagrosica is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae), native to the mountainous regions of western Iran. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pimpinella zagrosica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and indigestion. Herbal preparations of Pimpinella zagrosica include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
